tasks.title: 7 Cellars — Complete Chart of Accounts for QBO
tasks.summary: Full COA with 65+ accounts tailored for wine import/distribution in Cayman Islands. Covers assets, liabilities, equity (3 partners + Roberto vesting), revenue split by retail/wholesale, COGS with import duties and Roberto compensation tracking, and operating expenses. Ready for QBO CSV import.

tasks.title: Darryl's Q2 2026 CEO Rocks — Draft for Kyla
tasks.summary: 3 recommended rocks for Kyla submission: (1) Secure 2+ signed RTN partnership agreements, (2) Hit $1.3M CAD MRR, (3) Complete pre-diligence readiness package. All feed directly into Q3 growth equity round. Plus 2 alternates (Nick Deguise resolution, Olympus modernization).

tasks.title: Zuora Discovery — Platform Evaluation
tasks.summary: Full evaluation: Zuora is overkill at current scale ($50-500K/yr for dozens of clients). Recommendation: park for post-fundraise, consider Chargebee/Maxio if billing pain is real today. Includes 5 discovery questions for Trevor/Charles to determine urgency.

lastSummary: Overnight Mar 16-17: Three desk tasks completed. 7 Cellars QBO chart of accounts ready for import (task #26). Q2 CEO rocks drafted for Kyla (overdue Asana task). Zuora discovery done — recommendation is to defer and focus bandwidth on RTN/fundraise prep.
